text:
TYPE: 
CHAR 
LENGTH: 
1 
FILE(S): 
APR base 
SOURCE: 
T-MSIS annual provider TAF 
VALUES: 
0 = No 
1 = Yes (enrolled in Medicaid or both Medicaid and CHIP) 
COMMENT: 
Providers who are enrolled in both Medicaid and CHIP programs would also have 
PRVDR_CHIP_ENRLMT_IND equals “1” when this variable equals “1.”
